t_ch: 我、我全心全意地向您忏悔…请务必原谅我！
t_en: I... I wholeheartedly confess to you... Please, pardon my sins!

t_ch: 请你安心，我已恳请祂与我等同在。只要您心地诚实善良，就一定能得到宽恕。
t_en: Rest assured. I have implored THEIR presence to be with us. As long as you are sincere, absolution will be granted.

t_ch: 哦！哦，好…其实，我是偷渡来匹诺康尼的。为了买到船票，我把家里能卖的全都卖了，房子，土地…还有，两个孩子……
t_en: Oh! Oh, great... you know, I... I arrived in Penacony as a stowaway. I sold everything to get a ticket... my house, my land... and... my two children...

t_ch: 嗯…请你继续。
t_en: I see... Please go on.

t_ch: 继续跟在我身边，他们肯定会饿死，至少做奴隶还能混口饱饭吃。要是、要是我在这发达了，我立刻就去把他们赎回来，好好抚养长大……
t_en: My children were starving, and I hoped they'd have a chance at survival if they became slaves here. If... if I can strike it rich here, I'll lift them out of that situation... and give them the life they deserve...

t_ch: 结、结果我被猎犬家系的发现了，他们在到处抓我…我还想把孩子们都给接过来呢！都是我不好，都是我不好……
t_en: But, but, the Bloodhound Family got wind of it. They're on my tail... hunting me down... I thought I could bring my kids here! It was all my fault... all my fault...

t_ch: 家族愿意包容所有人。我会转达猎犬家系停止搜查。从此往后，你无需再过担惊受怕的日子。
t_en: The Family is ready to forgive all sinners. I'll ask the Bloodhound Family to cease their pursuit. You don't need to live in fear anymore.

t_ch: 谢谢，谢谢！我会努力工作，争取早日把孩子们赎回来，加入家族…赞、赞美谐乐！
t_en: Thank you, thank you! I'll work my hardest to redeem my children and make them part of The Family... P—Praise the Harmony!

t_ch: …请下一位上前。
t_en: ...Next. Please step forward.

t_ch: 好久不见啊，匹诺康尼最受瞩目的男人，橡木家系的次任家主…星期日先生？
t_en: Hey, long time no see, Mr. Sunday! The most esteemed individual in Penacony and... the next leader of the Oak Family, right?

t_ch: …我已恳请祂与我等同在，可以开始了。
t_en: ...I have sought THEIR presence with us. Let us proceed.

t_ch: 行吧。就按规定的流程来——咳咳！我犯了过错，请宽恕我的罪行：我在早饭时候浪费了半块披萨…还有一瓶苏乐达。
t_en: Sure, let's just get this over with. Ahem! I have sinned. Please forgive me! I wasted half a pizza at breakfast... and a bottle of SoulGlad.

t_ch: 就这些，没别的了。你是不是还有词要念？搞快点，我赶着去看机动球比赛呢。
t_en: That's it. Nothing more. Can we wrap this up? I've got a Roboball game to catch, you know?

t_ch: 你…是否愿意补赎善工，以偿清你本应受到的罪罚？
t_en: Do you... seek to atone for your sins through good deeds?

t_ch: 「罪罚」？开始装圣人了，哈？告诉你，家族没资格审判我，你更不行。
t_en: My "sins"!? Starting to sound like a saint, eh? Let me tell you something — Neither The Family nor you have the right to judge me.

t_ch: 你们家族的那点事谁不知道？忘记「钟表匠」了？去你的吧，鸡翅膀脑袋，我可不吃你们这套。骗骗那帮逐梦客得了，别把自己也给骗了。
t_en: You think nobody knows what your precious Family has done? About the Watchmaker, huh? Don't kid yourself, feather-brain. Those Dreamchasers might be fooled by your act, but don't fool yourself.

t_ch: 以后啊，念那些经文前，先好好想想…橡木家系能有今天的地位，你能坐在这，衣食无忧，高高在上，俯瞰所有人，靠的究竟是什么。
t_en: Before you start spouting off your holy verses, answer me this... Where does the power of the Oak Family come from? And your power? What makes you think you can sit there, all high and mighty, looking down on everyone else?

t_ch: 今天告解的时间够我进「同谐」乐园了吧？那我走了。希望你成功当选，哼…别让我赔本啊。
t_en: Well, I've spent enough time in confession today to enter the Harmony's paradise, right? Then I'll take my leave. Good luck with your election, and... don't make me regret my investments in you.

t_ch: 三重面相的灵魂啊，敬请聆听我的发问……
t_en: O, revered Triple-Faced Soul, hear my doubts...

t_ch: 如果强者的权势财富能掩盖罪行，谁能对他们予以裁决？
t_en: Who can judge the strong when their power hides their crimes?

t_ch: 如果弱者为延续生存需不惜代价，谁能为他们予以担保？
t_en: Who can vouch for the weak when they will pay any price to survive?

t_ch: 如果至纯善的灵魂都会犯下过错，谁能给他们予以宽慰？
t_en: Who can comfort the purest souls when even they get led astray?

t_ch: 若「以强援弱」果真是乐园的根基……
t_en: If "the strong defending the weak" is truly the foundation of paradise...

t_ch: 又是谁徒留他们在苦难的人间哀号？
t_en: ...then who— who is responsible for the suffering and anguish in this wretched world?

t_ch: 哥哥…哥哥…？
t_en: Brother... Brother...?

t_ch: …哥哥？你还好吗？
t_en: ...Brother? Are you alright?

t_ch: …没事。可能是工作太久，又从流梦礁返回，有些不适应。过会儿应该就好了。
t_en: ...I'm fine. I've been working long hours, and I just made a trip to Dreamflux Reef and back... So I'm a bit out of sorts. But it'll all be over before we know it.

t_ch: 星期日先生为谐乐大典日夜操劳，如今却遇上这种意外，即便星核问题非同小可，到底也有些教人过意不去啊。
t_en: You've been working non-stop on the Charmony Festival, Mr. Sunday, and no one could have predicted this incident. Even if the Stellaron does pose a grave threat, I still feel sorry for all the trouble we've caused you.

t_ch: 呵呵，无妨。谐乐大典本意是为增进银河的幸福和谐，但既然我们已知晓真相，那及时叫停便是。
t_en: Hehe, no need to worry about troubling anyone. The Charmony Festival was meant to spread joy and harmony across the Cosmos. But now that we know the truth, I'm afraid we'll have to cancel it.

t_ch: 让所有人幸福一直是我们兄妹二人的愿望…因此，我们会向梦主尽力争取。只要讲明个中原委，梦主应该能表示理解。
t_en: It has always been our wish to make everyone happy, so... we'll do our best to explain everything to the Dreammaster. I'm sure he'll understand.

t_ch: 即便最终交涉结果不尽人意…我也会拒绝登台。如果没有「调弦师」，{RUBY_B#「同谐」的化身}「齐响诗班」{RUBY_E#}便不会降世，大典也就不过是场普通的演出。
t_en: Even if the negotiation does not go smoothly... I'll refuse to go on stage. Without the Chordmaster, the {RUBY_B#Embodiment of Harmony}Harmonious Choir{RUBY_E#} would not arrive, and the Charmony Festival would be just a grand performance, and nothing more.

t_ch: 看到二位有如此决心，我也安心了。
t_en: I'm relieved to see your determination.

t_ch: 话说回来，我们此行来到匹诺康尼，还从未与梦主有过接触。五大家系的家主我都略有耳闻，却极少听到有关这位「梦主」的消息。
t_en: Y'know, since arriving in Penacony, we haven't had any contact with this Dreammaster himself. I'd heard of the heads of the five major lineages, but the Dreammaster is a mystery to me.

t_ch: 梦主极少现身人前，我们也很难得见。但此次事关重大，他承诺会亲自前来与我等一道磋商。
t_en: The Dreammaster rarely grants an audience — even for us. But given the urgency of the situation, he's agreed to meet us in person.

t_ch: 瓦尔特先生恐怕会成为近些年首位与梦主会晤的宾客呢。
t_en: Perhaps you'll be the first guest to meet the Dreammaster in years, Mr. Yang.

t_ch: 希望我们能得出令所有人都满意的结论。
t_en: Let's hope we can reach a consensus that satisfies everyone.

t_ch: 是啊，但愿如此。
t_en: Indeed — let us hope so.

t_ch: 时间差不多了，我和哥哥得先去做接见的准备…情势紧急，招待不周还请见谅。
t_en: It's about time. We'll have to get ready for the meeting... I apologize for any inconvenience caused by the urgency.

t_ch: 没事。我就在这等会便是。
t_en: Don't worry. I'll be waiting here.

t_ch: 天哪…是星期日先生！快来，这里！哈哈哈……
t_en: Oh, dear... it's Mr. Sunday! Hey, come over here! Hahaha...

t_ch: 看来有人需要帮助…我们去看看吧。
t_en: Looks like someone needs help... let's go check it out.

t_ch: 看看——这位可爱的小姐是谁呀？
t_en: Look who we have here? A lovely young lady.

t_ch: 咦，那是…我自己？
t_en: Wait, is that... me?

t_ch: 远方有渡鸦的叫声…看来梦主马上就要到了。
t_en: I heard a raven cawing in the distance... It seems the Dreammaster will arrive soon.

t_ch: 星期日先生…你好呀！瞧见了吗？那天上的月亮，就和我手中的苏乐达瓶盖相同大小！
t_en: Oh, Mr. Sunday... Hey there! Okay, see the moon in the sky? It's about the size of the cap on my SoulGlad bottle!

t_ch: 是不是…只要我伸出手，就能把月亮抓在怀里了？嗯？对吧？
t_en: If I just reached out my hand... I could grab the moon, couldn't I?

t_ch: 月亮…呵呵，你想说的是大剧院吧？
t_en: The moon... You mean the Grand Theater?

t_ch: 哦，哦！哈哈，你瞧我，一定是离家太久，太想念那轮月亮了…嗝。
t_en: Oh, yeah! Haha, look at me! I've been away from home for too long... I must be missing that moon... *hiccup*

t_ch: 不过…无所谓！咱们匹诺康尼的大剧院可比月亮亮堂多了…好看！养眼！
t_en: But... it's no big deal! The Grand Theater here looks much better than the moon back home... It's just... magnificent!

t_ch: 他们当年还劝我不要把家当全都卖掉，一门心思向着匹诺康尼…呸，真是目光短浅！
t_en: They told me not to sell everything I had just to come to Penacony... Tsk, how short-sighted!

t_ch: 「把家当全都卖掉」…为什么要做到这份上？
t_en: Selling everything you had? Why would you go to such lengths?

t_ch: 为什么？还能为什么…老家日子太苦，活得连个人样都没了。
t_en: Why? Can't you see...? Life back home is miserable... It's not really living at all.

t_ch: 还是匹诺康尼好啊，只有美梦，没有苦头，不用为明天烦恼，想做什么就做什么，这才叫活着呢…嗝，舒坦！
t_en: It's better to be here in Penacony! No pain, no worries about tomorrow, just sweet dreams! You can do whatever you want! That's what I call living... *hiccup* Yeah, now this is the life!

t_ch: 这…真的能算是活着吗……
t_en: Is this... truly "living"...?

t_ch: 嗝…嗯？小姑娘，你刚才问了什么？我没听清……
t_en: *hiccup* Huh...? What did you just say, young lady...? I didn't quite catch that...

t_ch: 没什么，先生。你看，格拉克斯大道上车流湍急，容易发生危险。艾迪恩公园就在附近，我让猎犬家系成员带您到那边继续享用美梦，如何？
t_en: Oh, it's nothing, sir. You see, the traffic on Glaux Avenue can be dangerous. How about I ask a Bloodhound Family member to escort you to Aideen Park over there so you can continue enjoying your sweet dream?

t_ch: 哦…好啊，你说得对。不愧是美梦的领导人，我的大救星！
t_en: Oh... yeah, that's a great idea! Wow, no wonder you're the leader of this sweet dream! You're totally a lifesaver!

t_ch: 那回见了，星期日先生。谢谢你陪我聊天…嗝。
t_en: See you around, Mr. Sunday! And... It was nice chatting with you... *hiccup*

t_ch: 知更鸟小姐！我们又见面了。谐乐大典的准备还顺利吧？我们都很期待呢。
t_en: Glad to meet you again, Robin! How are the preparations for the Charmony Festival coming along? We're all so excited about it!

t_ch: 很顺利，谢谢你，也辛苦你不远万里前来参加谐乐大典。
t_en: It's going smoothly. Thanks for making the trip to join the Festival.

t_ch: 哈哈，知更鸟小姐真是太客气了。能和宇宙各地的客人们一起没日没夜地狂欢，哪里辛苦！
t_en: You're too kind, Robin. It's a pleasure to have guests from all over the universe celebrating day and night!

t_ch: 我讨厌孤独，忍受不了无聊的生活，而这片充满乐子的梦境正适合我。
t_en: I can't stand being lonely or bored, so this jubilant Dreamscape is perfect for me.

t_ch: 要是这样的日子持续到永远…你会觉得厌倦吗？
t_en: But if this went on forever... would it get boring too?

t_ch: 当然不觉得！谁会嫌快乐太多呢？
t_en: Nah, not at all! Who would get tired of having so much fun?

t_ch: 每天都能穿漂亮衣服，随心所欲地体验各式各样的梦泡，怎么吃都不会胖，不会生病，不会变老…只要付得起房费，这里就是最棒的乐园！
t_en: Every day, you get to wear fancy clothes, explore all sorts of dream bubbles, indulge in delicious food without gaining weight, and you never get old or sick... As long as you can afford a room, this place is the ultimate paradise!

t_ch: 但…你应该也知道，能从梦境里带回现实的东西非常有限。
t_en: But... you know that only a few things can be brought back from the Dreamscape to reality, right?

t_ch: 所以我就不带回去嘛！在梦里过过瘾足够了。我不是长生种，一辈子也就六七十年，要顾及的东西又太多…能开开心心过好日子不容易了。
t_en: That's exactly why I don't plan on bringing anything back! Just enjoying the dream itself is good enough for me! I mean, I'm not one of those long-living species. I only have around sixty or seventy years in this lifetime, and there's so much to worry about... Being happy here is pure bliss.

t_ch: 只有在这片美梦里，我才能做自己的主人，真正地掌控自己的生活…尝过这种甜头，哪里还会想回去呢？
t_en: Only in this sweet dream can I truly feel like I'm in control of my life and fate... Who would want to go back to reality after experiencing this bliss?

t_ch: …我明白了，衷心祝愿你能过得幸福。
t_en: ...I see. I genuinely wish you all the happiness in the world.

t_ch: 也祝知更鸟小姐的演出圆满成功！我先去蓝调的时刻参加舞会了，回见。
t_en: And I wish you a fantastic performance, Robin! I'm off to the Blue Hour for the ball. See you later!
*sigh*

t_ch: 看来方才那位宾客的说辞也没能让你满意。
t_en: Seems like that guest's perspective didn't resonate with you either.

t_ch: 不，她说的有道理，我也能感觉到她打心底里感到幸福，只是……
t_en: She had a valid point, and I could sense her genuine happiness. It's just that...

t_ch: 你是想说…她以为自己成为了生活的主人，可也不过是抛弃现实逃遁到美梦中，失去庇护便会瞬间现出原形。
t_en: What you're trying to say is... she thinks she's in control of her life, but in reality, she's just escaping from reality and seeking solace in this sweet dream. Once she steps out of this sanctuary, everything will be lost.

t_ch: 嗯。毕竟，她也提到了「房费」…不是吗？
t_en: Well, she did make mention of being able to "afford a room"... didn't she?

t_ch: 但我们心目中的那座乐园…不应该有终点。
t_en: However, the paradise in our dreams... it doesn't have to end.

t_ch: 我们心目中的那座乐园…也不应该只是一场虚无缥缈的梦。
t_en: No, and the paradise we yearn for... shouldn't be just a fleeting dream either.

t_ch: 这片梦境的风景真的很美，对吧？
t_en: The scenery in this Dreamscape is truly breathtaking, isn't it?

t_ch: 哦？竟然是知更鸟小姐…真是荣幸。
t_en: Oh, Robin? Can't believe I'm meeting you in person here... What an honor.

t_ch: 你说得对。虽然梦境里的时间不会流动，但常看常新…我每次都会有些新的感触。
t_en: You're right. Even though time stands still in this Dreamscape, it always feels fresh... I find something new every time.

t_ch: 一位善于思考的哲学家…但愿我没有打扰到您。
t_en: A philosophical mind... I hope I'm not intruding.

t_ch: 不会，我时日无多，反倒希望有人能陪我说说话——更何况是像您这样尊贵的女士。方便的话，想聊聊吗？
t_en: Not at all. With little time left, I yearn for meaningful conversations, especially with someone as esteemed as you. Do you mind if we chat?

t_ch: 乐意效劳，那就随便聊聊吧。您方才提到「时日无多」…恕我冒昧，您是为了这个才来到匹诺康尼的吗？
t_en: It's my pleasure. No need to be formal — just speak your mind. You said "with little time left"... Please forgive me for being blunt, but is that why you came to Penacony?

t_ch: 呵呵，是啊…我上过战场，从苏克乌的母舰里爬出来的时候，顺便在脑袋里塞了点带辐射的铁疙瘩。
t_en: Hehe, yeah... I was part of a war, and while escaping from the Sukhousian mothership, I got exposed to some radioactive materials.

t_ch: 还有呢？战友全走了，故乡也在几场中子辐射轰炸里融化了。哼，全没了，实在是活不下去啊…但听说这地头还有人有法子，我就过来了。
t_en: And then? All my comrades died, and my hometown was wiped out by neutron bombardments. I couldn't bear to live with everything I knew gone... That's when I heard about a possible solution here, so I came.

t_ch: 太遗憾了…希望家族能为你排忧解难。
t_en: How heart-wrenching... I hope The Family has been able to help you.

t_ch: 家族确实帮了我许多，我要对此表示万分感谢。他们为我安排了一个舒适的房间、全银河最先进的维生装置，还有足足一个加强排的护理师。
t_en: They have, and I'm truly grateful for that. They provided me with a comfortable room, the most advanced life-support devices in the Cosmos, and a stellar team of caregivers.

t_ch: 现在我的身体固定在入梦池中，依靠维生装置存活。你见到的我是完整的，神智清醒，和正常人没有区别…但酒店里的我不是这样。
t_en: My physical body is now in the Dreampool, sustained by life support. The me you see here is whole, rational, and no different from any other person... but I can't say the same for the "me" in the hotel room.

t_ch: 真实的模样…呵，知更鸟小姐，希望你永远不会见着。
t_en: My true appearance... Well, I hope you never have to witness it, Robin.

t_ch: 所以…你要永远活在这片梦境里了，对吗？
t_en: So... you'll be living forever in this Dreamscape, right?

t_ch: 呵呵，能活着就是万幸了。梦不梦的无所谓，毕竟我没得选。
t_en: Heh, just being able to live at all is good enough for me. Whether it's in this Dreamscape or not, well, I don't really have much say in the matter.

t_ch: 我的世界本来就是残缺的，说不定下个瞬间就会消失不见，所以…就算梦境再怎么虚假，对我来说也是乐园。我珍惜在这里的每时每刻。
t_en: My world has been torn apart, and my life could end any second. So... even if this whole place is an illusion, it's still my paradise, and I'll treasure every moment I spend here.

t_ch: 哈…真羡慕这些永恒不变的东西啊。
t_en: Heh... how I envy those everlasting things...

t_ch: 那位老人的故事…太令人悲伤了，好在这座美梦确实为他的余生留下了幸福的念想。
t_en: That old man's story... it's so tragic. Fortunately, this sweet dream gives him joyful memories to hold onto for the rest of his life.

t_ch: 这就是匹诺康尼的美梦存在的意义。
t_en: That's precisely why this sweet dream in Penacony exists.

t_ch: 但美梦终究是有局限的。它只是失意者们避风的港湾，并不能从现实的源头根除痛苦。
t_en: However, even the sweet dream has its limitations. While it provides solace to the disillusioned, it can't completely eliminate pain in reality.

t_ch: 总会有办法的——匹诺康尼已经走在正确的道路上了。
t_en: There will be a way out. Penacony is already on the right track.

t_ch: 怎么了，妹妹？
t_en: What's up, sister?

t_ch: 明明是在梦想之地，为什么人们却会过上这种生活呢？
t_en: This is the land of the dreams, but why do they live like this?

t_ch: 刚才那位先生…一点都不幸福。
t_en: The man we ran into... he doesn't seem happy at all.

t_ch: 美梦再怎么甜蜜，也是看不见摸不着的幻象，却被他当作生存的唯一选择，甚至为此放弃了现实中的未来…这根本算不得「生活」。
t_en: Even though sweet dreams are nice, they're just illusions. But for him, they're the only way to survive, even if it means giving up on reality... That's not really living at all.

t_ch: 嗯，这样啊…可在我看来，这反倒是常人该有的活法。
t_en: I suppose you have a point... but in my opinion, that's how most people live their lives.

t_ch: …为什么这么说？
t_en: ...Why do you say that?

t_ch: 你刚才说，那位先生以美梦维生算不得「生活」，其实不然。就算没有匹诺康尼，人们也会活在各自的幻觉中，这幻觉名为「自我价值」。
t_en: You think that man is not actually "living," but that's not quite accurate. Even without Penacony, people create their own illusions called "self-value."

t_ch: 人们总以为自己命中注定要实现某种价值。为自己挣得价值便意味着强大的力量，相反，无价值的人则被贬为弱者。
t_en: People believe they have a predetermined value to fulfill. Gaining value means gaining power, and those deemed worthless are seen as the weak.

t_ch: 然而价值并非是由人们凭空创造的，其总和亦有上限。要想实现所谓的价值，人就必须从他人手中掠夺。就这样，弱者们被剥削、被压迫……
t_en: However, value doesn't come out of thin air, and there's a limit to it. To accumulate value, people have to take from others. So, the weak get exploited and oppressed...

t_ch: 你是想说…事情不应该是这样的，对吧？
t_en: Are you suggesting that... this is not how things should be?

t_ch: 正是。然而讽刺的是，人们不觉得这么做是错的。因为他们始终将那虚无缥缈的「自我价值」奉为圭臬，就连弱者也是这么认为。
t_en: Exactly, but ironically, people don't think there's anything wrong with it, because they uphold the illusory notion of self-value, and even the weak believe in it.

t_ch: 适者生存，弱肉强食…世间的一切悲剧皆源于此。而匹诺康尼之所以为美梦，正是因为它为任何想要从中脱身的人提供了一片安眠之地……
t_en: Survival of the fittest... that's where all the tragedies in the world come from. People come to the sweet dream in Penacony to escape from that reality and find solace.

t_ch: 这里没有悲剧，只有幸福——虽然只有雏形，但这不正是我们心目中乐园的样子么？
t_en: No tragedies exist here, only happiness, although in its nascent form. Isn't that the same paradise we yearn for in our dreams?

t_ch: 也许刚才那位先生只是特例吧。在得出结论前，我想还是能在梦境里亲眼看看为好，就像流梦礁那时一样。
t_en: Perhaps that man is just an exception. Let's not jump to conclusions. We should experience the Dreamscape ourselves, just as I did at Dreamflux Reef.

t_ch: 嗯，眼见为实，我陪你一起。梦主还未大驾光临，我们还有时间到处转转。
t_en: Yes, seeing is believing. I'll accompany you. The Dreammaster hasn't shown up yet, so we have some time for a stroll.

t_ch: 哥哥！好巧，我们又见面了。
t_en: Brother! What a surprise to see you again.

t_ch: 现出真身吧，你的诡计于我们无用。
t_en: Show yourself. Your trick won't work on us.

t_ch: 我听说有位善于欺诈的假面愚者也收到了邀请…看来就是你了。玩得还愉快吗？
t_en: I've heard that a skilled Masked Fool received an invitation too... That must be you, right? Did you enjoy yourself?

t_ch: 勉勉强强吧。这里的人都太好骗了，稍微给点甜头就会上钩，有危险的时候又缩得飞快——简单说，就是人傻钱多还怕死呗！
t_en: Barely. The people here are way too gullible. A little bait is all it takes for them to bite, and they run away at the slightest hint of danger. In other words, they're naive and cowardly!

t_ch: 既然你玩够了，那还是趁早离开为好。「同谐」的乐章不能容忍杂音。
t_en: Now that you've had your fill, it'd be wise to leave before it's too late. The music of the Harmony doesn't tolerate discord.

t_ch: 怎么？本尊回来了，我就没用了？亏我还帮了家族那么多忙，真是太令人心寒了呀。
t_en: What? Now that you have the real Robin, I'm useless? Oh, how disheartening! I've done so much for The Family.

t_ch: 你们该好好感谢我，要不是我肯收拾这个烂摊子…现在匹诺康尼早就乱成一锅粥了哦？
t_en: You should be thanking me because if it weren't for me cleaning up this mess... Penacony would still be in shambles. Don't you think?

t_ch: 那是鸢尾花家主的私人请求，与我们无关。退下，别再给谐乐大典添乱了。
t_en: That was a personal request from the head of the Iris Family, and it has nothing to do with us. Step aside and stop causing trouble for the Charmony Festival.

t_ch: 谐乐大典？哼哼，吓唬谁呢，以为我不知道各位在打什么主意吗？
t_en: The Charmony Festival? Heh, you think you can scare me? You think I've no idea what you're planning?

t_ch: 且不提你是怎么想的，鸡翅膀男孩，我们这位可爱的知更鸟小姐现在应该是打定主意不登台了吧？毕竟你也看到了，这座美梦在「同谐」的运作下有多难看……
t_en: I don't care what you're thinking, chicken wing boy, but I'm pretty sure our lovely Robin won't be appearing on stage. After all, you're well aware of what a sorry state this Dreamscape is in under the banner of Harmony...

t_ch: 「梦想之地」匹诺康尼…你们兄妹二人想要的乐园就长这副模样吗？
t_en: Penacony, the Land of the Dreams... is this truly the paradise you desire?

t_ch: …住口！
t_en: ...Stop it!

t_ch: 急啦，鸡翅膀男孩？戳到你痛处了？
t_en: What's the rush, chicken wing boy? Did I get to you?

t_ch: 我们的约定与你无关，愚者。赶紧离开，否则别怪家族不客气。
t_en: Our paradise is none of your concern, Masked Fool. Leave now, or The Family won't tolerate you anymore.

t_ch: 好，好～我走就是啦。不过，知更鸟小姐，我还是得奉劝你再仔细琢磨琢磨——
t_en: Alright, alright. I'll go, but Robin, I suggest you seriously consider this...

t_ch: ——活在梦里的人们，真的能够远离痛苦，收获真正的幸福吗？
t_en: ...Do you really believe those living in dreams can escape pain and find true happiness?

t_ch: 呵呵，我该做的事都做完了，接下来就只等看烟花咯。
t_en: Well, I've done my part, and now I'm simply waiting for the fireworks to begin.

t_ch: 最后的两份礼物就送你们啦。如果谐乐大典还是不幸召开了…千万记得在演出现场使用，可别弄丢了哦。
t_en: Here, the last two gifts for both of you, and don't lose them. If, by some unfortunate chance, the Charmony Festival starts against all odds... remember to use them during the show.

t_ch: 砰——会很刺激的！
t_en: And it'll be thrilling! Bang!

t_ch: 麻烦两位代为接引了，我就在这里等待各位的消息。
t_en: Thank you for everything you've done. I'll be waiting here.

t_ch: …我猜到了。若非如此，哥哥绝不会只字不提它的下落。
t_en: ...I had surmised as much. I knew you wouldn't have avoided mentioning the bird for no reason.

t_ch: 尽管结局令人遗憾，但我仍然坚信这个选择没错。鸟儿不是为了在笼子里度过一生才破壳而出的…就算它们无力飞翔，天空也是它们的归宿。
t_en: Despite that unfortunate outcome, I still believe it was the right decision. Birds aren't meant to spend their lives in cages... They belong in the sky, even if they can't fly.

t_ch: 但这就是问题所在。如果这世上有些雏鸟，终其一生都无法飞翔，我们又怎能断言天空才是它们的归宿？
t_en: But here's the thing. If there are birds in this world that can never fly, can we really assert that they belong in the sky?

t_ch: 你想说…人类也是如此？
t_en: Are you implying... that the same goes for humans too?

t_ch: 想想星穹列车吧，这正是个好例子。无名客为联结诸界付出了巨大努力，誉满寰宇…然而，能坚持在如此苦旅中奔波的无非寥寥数人，更非等闲之辈。
t_en: Let's take the Astral Express as an example. The Nameless made tremendous efforts to bridge worlds, gaining fame across the universe... However, only a few extraordinary individuals can endure such a perilous journey.

t_ch: 因为「开拓」的事业绝非凡人能够承载。否则，这条命途又怎会一度落得银轨断绝、列车废弃、{RUBY_B#阿基维利}星神{RUBY_E#}陨落的下场？
t_en: That's because the pursuit of the Trailblaze exceeds the capabilities of ordinary humans. Otherwise, why would this Path be filled with broken rails, an abandoned Express, and even a fallen {RUBY_B#Akivili}Aeon{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: 歪理。要是按这个逻辑推导，未来岂不是变成了英雄们的特权？
t_en: That's just sophistry. If that were true, then only the powerful would have the right to determine the future.

t_ch: 很遗憾，现实正是如此。「未来」的别名…正是「自我价值」。
t_en: Unfortunately, that's exactly what happens. Another name for "the future" is "self-value."

t_ch: 这世上固然存在英雄，人们向往、歌颂他们，但绝大多数普通人，终其一生也无法成为英雄。
t_en: While this world has its fair share of heroes who inspire people and garner admiration for their heroic deeds, the majority of ordinary people will never become heroes in their lifetime.

t_ch: 有人生来弱小无助，有人陷于后天的不幸，有人向卑劣和怯懦屈服。在生存面前，他们同样平等，只能目视自己的{RUBY_B#未来}价值{RUBY_E#}不断被外物掠夺。
t_en: Some are born weak and vulnerable, some find themselves trapped in unfortunate circumstances, some fall victim to malice and cowardice. When it comes to survival, everyone is equal, and the weak can only watch as their {RUBY_B#future}value{RUBY_E#} gets constantly diminished by external forces.

t_ch: 所以我们才应当对弱者施以关爱和照料，给予充分的援助，如同那是我们自身…「谐乐颂」也始终是这么教导我们。
t_en: That's why we should care for the weak and support them as if their suffering were our own... That's what the Odes of Harmony have always taught us.

t_ch: 「同谐」的志向固然远大，可即便在这无忧无虑的美梦中，也是强者恒强，弱者愈弱…人性如此，它固然存在伟大的一面，却也有无论如何都不可消弭的弱小。
t_en: While the Harmony holds noble aspirations, the strong will always be strong, and the weak will always be weak, even in this carefree dream... Human nature contains greatness, but it also harbors inherent weaknesses that can't be eradicated.

t_ch: 究其根本，倘若人们连生存都无法保证，更遑论那虚无缥缈的平等未来。只要世间尚存「自然选择」的法则…就注定会有坠落在地的雏鸟。
t_en: In the end, if people can't even secure their own survival, they won't care about the illusory future of equality. As long as the law of survival of the fittest prevails... there will always be fledglings crashing to their death.

t_ch: 如果人们不为未来而活，难道就只是为活而活吗？如果哥哥认为「同谐」也无法挽救弱者的困境，那又有哪位星神能实现我们的理想？
t_en: But if people don't live for the future, do they merely exist for survival? If even you, my brother, don't believe that the Harmony will save the weak, then which Aeon can make our dreams come true?

t_ch: 人们总是会忘记，曾经，当第一只鸟儿飞上天际，那时整个世界对它的期许……
t_en: People often forget that when the first bird took flight, the entire world envisioned a future where...

t_ch: 是自此以后，不再有任何雏鸟坠亡大地。
t_en: No more fledglings would ever crash to their death.

t_ch: 妹妹，你在读书吗？在读什么？
t_en: Are you reading, sister? What are you reading?

t_ch: 歌斐木先生给了我一本画册！讲的是「谐乐众弦」的故事。
t_en: Mr. Gopher Wood gave me a picture book! It's about the story of the Harmonic Strings!

t_ch: 如果能成为调弦师，我想要召唤…「齐响诗班」多米尼克斯！我想要和大家一起歌唱，把我们的愿望传递出去，让大家都能感受到幸福和喜悦。
t_en: If I could become a Chordmaster, I'd like to summon... Dominicus the Harmonious Choir! I want to sing with everyone and spread our wishes so that all can feel happiness and joy.

t_ch: 这样啊。那…我也选「齐响诗班」好了。
t_en: I see. Then... I would summon the Harmonious Choir, too.

t_ch: 哥哥…没有自己的愿望吗？
t_en: Don't you... have a wish of your own, brother?

t_ch: 当然有啊。只是…那其中也包含了你的愿望，大家的愿望。那会是一片真正的乐园，所有人都能从中获得安宁。
t_en: Of course, I do. It's just that... it includes your wish and everyone else's. I long for a true paradise where everyone can find peace.

t_ch: 然后，我们就在其中搭一个舞台，邀请所有人来看我们的演出，这样我和哥哥的愿望都能实现了，就用「齐响诗班」的力量。
t_en: Then let's build a stage there and invite everyone to our performance so that both our wishes come true, through the power of the Harmonious Choir.

t_ch: 好啊，那我们约好了。
t_en: It's a deal then.

t_ch: 嗯，拉勾！不过，要怎么做才能成为调弦师呢……
t_en: Yeah, it's a deal! But how can I become a Chordmaster...?

t_ch: 也许，要先变成星星才行吧。
t_en: Maybe you'll have to become a star first.

t_ch: 这里正合适，我们就在此等候梦主到来吧。
t_en: Let's wait here for the Dreammaster to arrive.

t_ch: 嗯。话说回来，哥哥，我听说你现在再也不碰甜食了。明明小时候还经常和我抢餐后甜点……
t_en: Okay. By the way, brother, I heard you no longer have a sweet tooth. Back when we were kids, you used to steal my desserts...

t_ch: 总觉得，我离开的这段时间，很多事都变得不一样了。到底发生了什么？
t_en: Seems like a lot has changed during my absence. What exactly happened?

t_ch: 即便在美梦中，也必须有人时刻保持清醒。
t_en: Well, someone has to stay awake even in this sweet dream.

t_ch: 但那个人不应该是你，也不应该是任何特定的某个人。哥哥，你给自己的负担太多了。
t_en: But that "someone" doesn't have to be you or anyone in particular. You're carrying too much on your shoulders, brother.

t_ch: 我们约定中的乐园…不该是这样的。
t_en: The paradise in our dreams... it shouldn't be like this.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼只是一场梦。它无法消除现实中的烦恼和痛苦，给人带来真正的幸福…它能做的无非为人们提供一个逃避现实的去处，但也仅此而已。
t_en: Penacony is nothing more than a dream. It can't erase the worries and pain of reality or bring true happiness... It only offers an escape from reality. Nothing more.

t_ch: 还记得刚才那位老人吗？如果没有这场梦，他可能已坠入万劫不复的境地了。
t_en: Remember the old man we met earlier? Without this dream, he might have completely lost himself.

t_ch: 诚然…可即便没有匹诺康尼，他也有可能走上另一种生活。据我所知，博识学会早就在推广相应的康复治疗技术了。
t_en: That might be true, but... even without Penacony, he could have chosen another path. As far as I know, the Intelligentsia Guild has been promoting their rehabilitation techniques for a long time now.

t_ch: 尽管那种生活会平凡、艰难许多，可现在，他在昏迷中接受名为「美梦」的临终关怀，他的结局…已经注定了。
t_en: That path may have been more ordinary and challenging, but now he's in a comatose state, and the "sweet dream" has become a sort of end-of-life care. His fate... is sealed.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼究竟是给予了这些人未来，还是夺走了他们的未来？
t_en: Is Penacony granting these people a future, or is it taking it away from them?

t_ch: 在那之前，你要知道…并非所有的人都能走向未来。
t_en: Well, don't forget this... not everyone really has a future.

t_ch: 未来之于人，正如天空之于鸟儿。人们之所以误以为飞翔是鸟类的天性，是因为他们从没见过那些坠亡在地的鸟儿。
t_en: The future for humanity is like the sky for birds. People mistakenly believe that flight is inherent to birds because they've never witnessed those birds crashing to their death.

t_ch: 记得小时候收养的那只谐乐鸽吗？我们是如何对待它的？
t_en: Do you remember how we took in that little Charmony Dove when we were young?

t_ch: 我们认真将它在鸟笼里养大，每天喂食换水，梳理它的羽毛，后来…决定离开匹诺康尼的时候，我打开笼子的门，让它回到了天空。
t_en: Yeah, we took care of it — provided food and water, and groomed its feathers. And later... when I decided to leave Penacony, I opened the cage and set it free.

t_ch: 担心会让你悲伤，我没有在信件中提及此事。
t_en: Well, I didn't mention what happened to it in my letters, because I didn't want to upset you.

t_ch: 你走后不久，它就坠落在了你房间的窗前。
t_en: Shortly after you left, it crashed to its death right in front of your window.

t_ch: …你们的意思是，长久以来，竟有恶徒将我等为世人赐福的谐乐大典…当做实现野心的工具？
t_en: ...You mean to say, that for the longest time, there have been scoundrels who would use the Charmony Festival that I have bequeathed to the masses... as a tool to realize their ambition?

t_ch: 正是，梦主大人。一旦谐乐大典开始，星核的力量将随着歌声传遍整个匹诺康尼…届时，梦中的所有人都将无法从梦中醒来。
t_en: Indeed, Dreammaster. Once the Charmony Festival begins, the Stellaron's powers, along with the song will be broadcast across the entire planet of Penacony... And then, everyone in their dreams will be unable to awaken.

t_ch: 嗯，这倒是令我意外。梦境是五大家族共同维护的结果，若有人利用谐乐肆意散布那星核的力量，此人必然身居高位……
t_en: Hmm, this is indeed surprising to me. The Dreamscape is maintained by the collective effort of the Five Families. If someone were to use the Charmony Festival to recklessly disseminate the power of the Stellaron, this individual must hold a position of great authority...

t_ch: 你们可有怀疑的对象？
t_en: Do you have any suspects?

t_ch: 请问，您当真不知道星核的存在？
t_en: I'd like to ask: Did you really not know of the Stellaron's existence?

t_ch: 呵…我倒是从未想过，这位无名客会直接将矛头指向本人，着实令人瞠目结舌。
t_en: Heh... I would've never thought that this Nameless would point the spear at me, quite astonishing indeed.

t_ch: 如有冒犯，星穹列车向您郑重道歉。但眼下情势紧急，容不得细密探访了。这也是为了梦境的安稳着想，还请您打消我们的顾虑。
t_en: If I have offended, the Astral Express extends its sincere apologies... but the current circumstances are dire, and leave no room for meticulous inquiry. We're doing this out of concern for the Dreamscape's safety... so if you could, please alleviate our concerns.

t_ch: 梦主大人，只要证明谐乐大典与星核无关，是我们多心了的话…我会如约回到舞台献唱。
t_en: Dreammaster, it's just to prove that the Charmony Festival has nothing to do with the Stellaron. If we're being overly cautious... I will return to the stage to offer tribute in song, just per the arrangement.
Hmm...

t_ch: 星期日，知更鸟，我看着你们长大，深知你们的秉性。现今的你们，确可称为{RUBY_B#同谐}祂{RUBY_E#}最虔信的传颂者…我已知晓你们的决心。
t_en: Sunday, Robin, I've watched you two grow up, and know your dispositions like the back of my hand. Both of you right now, can surely be lauded as {RUBY_B#Harmony}THEIR{RUBY_E#} most devout advocates... I already know your resolve.

t_ch: 兹事体大，非同等闲。既然瓦尔特先生诚心相求，我自当亲力亲为，以示回应。如有必要，整个橡木家系也可随各位差遣。
t_en: The magnitude of this matter is enormous, and cannot be taken lightly. Since Mr. Yang has asked with such earnestness, I will personally respond in kind. If there is a need, the entire Oak Family will be mobilized to heed your call.

t_ch: 星期日，可否使你向祂恳求，降下光芒，并代祂朝我提问，令所有谎言无所遁形？
t_en: Sunday, might I ask you to beseech THEM to cast THEIR light unto me, and question me in THEIR stead, so that no lies may be concealed?

t_ch: 谨遵您的旨意。
t_en: I will do as you command.

t_ch: 知更鸟，可否使你临场见证，记录实情，并传述我的清白，令全部污名悉数消散？
t_en: Robin, could I entrust you to be present as a witness, to document the truth, and to proclaim my innocence, so that all slander may be utterly dispelled?

t_ch: 谨遵您的旨意。
t_en: I will do as you command.

t_ch: 我等愿尔旨承行于地…如于天焉。
t_en: May thy will be carried out on earth... just as it is in the heavens.

t_ch: 「三重面相的灵魂啊，请你用热铁烙他的舌和手心，使他不能编造谎话，立定假誓。」
t_en: "Oh, Triple-Faced Soul, please sear his tongue and palms with a hot iron, so that he will not be able to fabricate lies and make false vows."

t_ch: 开始吧，我没什么好准备的。
t_en: Let us begin. There is nothing else to prepare.

t_ch: 是。
t_en: Understood.

t_ch: 「试问：你是否始终对你的神虔诚，从未敬拜别神？」
t_en: "Question: Have you devoted your life to your God, never worshiping other Gods?"

t_ch: 自然如此。
t_en: Naturally.

t_ch: 「你是否爱你的神如同爱你自身，始终记念祂的告诫？」
t_en: "Do you love your God as you do yourself, always heeding THEIR admonishments?"

t_ch: 自然如此。
t_en: Naturally.

t_ch: 「你是否叛离了你的神所期望的路，辜负了祂的名？」
t_en: "Have you strayed from the path expected by your God, betraying THEIR name?"

t_ch: 从未有过。
t_en: Never.

t_ch: 「你是否对你的神要求僭越，妄图超过受造物的本分？」
t_en: "Have you ever been inordinate with your asks of your God, coveting more than the foundation of the creation itself?"

t_ch: 从未有过。
t_en: Never.

t_ch: 那么，最后一个问题——
t_en: Then, a final question...

t_ch: 「你是否能够发誓，保证自己必定履行一切所许，无论过往、现今，还是未来？」
t_en: "Do you swear to fulfill all vows, past, present and future?"

t_ch: 星神在上，若我所言不实，或食言背约，则依照律令承受诅咒。
t_en: With the Aeon as my witness, if I do not deliver on my words, or if I renege on my vows, may I be cursed in accordance with divine law.

t_ch: …祂看到了你的信念，并对你的信念表示认可。如此，即可证明——
t_en: ...THEY have seen your faith, and have endorsed your faith. With this, it can be evidenced—

t_ch: 请等一下。
t_en: Just a moment.

t_ch: 怎么了，瓦尔特先生？
t_en: What is it, Mr. Yang?

t_ch: 各位，我还有个问题希望得到解答。
t_en: ...I have another question I hope to have answered.

t_ch: 据我所知，家族的和睦共荣从来都不依托于所谓的「律令」……
t_en: To my understanding, The Family's harmony and prosperity have never relied on so-called "divine laws"...

t_ch: 两位方才口中的「神」，当真是那位{RUBY_B#同谐}希佩{RUBY_E#}么？
t_en: The "God" you both mentioned... are THEY truly {RUBY_B#The Harmony}Xipe{RUBY_E#}?

t_ch: 瓦尔特先生理应知晓，家族子民亲如手足，在祂的光芒下拥抱团结、万众一心，一切二心在「同谐」面前无所遁形。
t_en: Mr. Yang should know that those belonging to The Family toil together as if they were kin, embracing solidarity and unity under THEIR Light. All duplicity is laid bare before the Harmony.

t_ch: 如此精妙复杂的乐章，若非神主希佩，又有哪一位神明能够完美调和？
t_en: Such a delicate and complex symphony, which other God could perfectly harmonize this if not for the Great One, Xipe?

t_ch: 「完美调和」…问题正在于此。在暗中潜移默化改变「同谐」的并非外敌，而是自这曲乐章中暗自诞生的…不协和音。
t_en: "Perfectly harmonize"... Therein lies the problem. It isn't an outsider lurking in the shadows who changed the Harmony, but a dissonance that has surreptitiously emerged from within this very symphony itself.

t_ch: 在久远的过去，曾有一柱星神存在于世间。祂拨动指节，编织银河律法，祂的信众组成「天外合唱班」，向全宇宙传扬庄严、肃穆的圣歌。
t_en: In the distant past, there existed an Aeon. With one flick of the wrist, THEY crafted the laws of the cosmos. THEIR followers formed the Beyond the Sky Choir, spreading solemn and reverent hymns throughout the universe.

t_ch: 后来，祂陨落了。这位星神所行的道路与「同谐」产生碰撞，为后者吞纳、同化。那响彻寰宇的合唱一度沉默，再奏响时，已成了谐乐的颂歌……
t_en: Later, THEY fell. The route traversed by this Aeon clashed with the Harmony, ultimately being absorbed and fused into it. The chorus that once reverberated across worlds fell silent, and when it echoed anew, it was transformed into the hymn of Harmony...

t_ch: 纵使星神消亡，也会留下无主的命途。在包容万象的「同谐」中…自然也可能有旧日的杂音悄然滋生。
t_en: Though an Aeon may perish, paths with no masters still linger. In the all-forgiving Harmony... echoes of bygone dissonance may subtly arise.

t_ch: 瓦尔特先生……
t_en: Mr. Yang...

t_ch: 过分敏锐绝非益事，尤其是你在孤立无援的时刻。
t_en: Being overly astute can be a detriment, especially when you find yourself alone, and without allies.

t_ch: 哼，果然是这样。
t_en: Hmph... so this is how it is.

t_ch: 为我等伟业着想，星期日，请二位稍作歇息吧。
t_en: For the sake of our grand cause, Sunday, please afford these two an opportunity to rest.

t_ch: 什么…？
t_en: What...?

t_ch: 对不起，知更鸟，唯独你…我不想你知道这一切。可惜，事与愿违。
t_en: Sorry, Robin, it's just you... I did not wish for you to know this. It's a pity that things have turned out this way.

t_ch: 所以这才是我无法歌唱的真正原因？笼罩匹诺康尼的阴影，其实是……
t_en: So this is the true reason I can't sing? The shadow that envelops Penacony is actually...

t_ch: 我们从来不是「同谐」的孩子，你我理想中的乐园…也不应由希佩创造。万众的幸福，只能由立于万众之上的「一人」来承诺。
t_en: We were never children of the Harmony. Our ideal paradise... could not have been crafted by Xipe. True bliss can only be guaranteed by the "one" who transcends the many.

t_ch: 于律法之中，人类构建社会……
t_en: Within the foundation of law, humanity establishes civilization...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>于「同谐」之中，我们拥获「秩序」。</color>
t_en: And through Harmony, we obtain Order.

t_ch: （同伴下落不明，丹恒兄弟应该是有点急了。给他些时间吧，担忧是判断力的毒药。）
t_en: (Dan Heng seems pretty worried about his companions. I should give him some space. Stressing out about it won't help anything.)

t_ch: （这鬼地方真够大的…别走太远，省得他一会儿找不着人。）
t_en: (This place is too big... I better not wander too far in case he can't find me later.)

t_ch: 我们要怎么进入贵宾室？
t_en: How do we get into the VIP lounge?

t_ch: 这算什么事，交给江湖智慧。
t_en: This is where my street smarts come into play.

t_ch: 嚯！真不愧是盛会之星，现实里的酒吧都这么气派。
t_en: Wow! This bar is something else — certainly worthy of the Planet of Festivities.

t_ch: 欢迎来到「白日梦」酒店，请问有什么可以为您效劳的？
t_en: Welcome to the Reverie Hotel. How may I help you?

t_ch: 你好，我们是星穹列车的无名客，想来办理入住手续。
t_en: Greetings. We're the Nameless from the Astral Express, and we'd like to check in.

t_ch: 星穹列车？可是之前……
t_en: The Astral Express? But I thought...

t_ch: 是的，之前伙伴们已经先行入住了。我叫「丹恒」，酒店系统中应该有我的个人信息。
t_en: Yes, my companions already checked in. My name is Dan Heng, and I believe my personal information is recorded in your system.

t_ch: 原来如此。不过当时您的伙伴说，您行程有变，没办法入住了。
t_en: I see, but your companions said you wouldn't be coming due to a change of plans.

t_ch: 哈！这不是计划又有变了么。
t_en: Hah! Now the plans have changed again!

t_ch: 请问您是？
t_en: And you are...?

t_ch: 我是刚登上星穹列车的新人无名客，叫「帕姆」。
t_en: Me? I'm Pom-Pom, a new Nameless who's also with the Astral Express.

t_ch: …他是我的同伴。他登上列车前，我们就回复了家族的邀请函。所以系统里应该没有他的记录，有没有办法通融一下？
t_en: ...He's my fellow Trailblazer. We responded to The Family's invitation before he boarded the Express, so he wasn't registered in your system. Is it possible to accommodate him as well?

t_ch: 哦！已经先行入住的几位无名客中，似乎也有一位是这样的情况。看来最近踏上「开拓」的人是越来越多了。
t_en: Oh, I see! Another one of the Nameless had a similar situation. Seems like a lot of people are joining the Trailblaze these days.

t_ch: 因为有先例，原则上应该没问题。请容我联系一下二位的同伴——
t_en: Since there is a precedent, it shouldn't be a problem. Just give me a second to contact your companions...

t_ch: …呃，不好意思。两位，我这边似乎联系不上星穹列车的住客们。
t_en: ...I'm sorry, dear guests, but it seems I'm unable to reach the other members of the Astral Express.

t_ch: 联系不上是什么意思？
t_en: What do you mean by "unable to reach" them?

t_ch: 非常抱歉，我也是第一次遇见这种情况。不过系统显示，几位客人仍然在梦境中。
t_en: My apologies. This is the first time I've encountered a situation like this. However, the system indicates that those guests are still in the Dreamscape.

t_ch: …要不这样，你给个房间号，我俩过去看看。
t_en: ...How about this? Give me their room number, and we'll go check on them ourselves.

t_ch: 这恐怕不行，必须在确认二位的身份后，我才能告知宾客的个人信息。
t_en: I'm afraid that's not possible. I need to verify both of your identities before I can share any guest information.

t_ch: 那你随便挑一位——就瓦尔特了——把他强制唤醒不就行了？
t_en: How about you just wake up someone? Let's say... Welt?

t_ch: 这也不行，强制唤醒有严格的使用条例，是切不能随意操作的。
t_en: I'm sorry, but there are strict rules regarding forced awakening — it cannot be done without the proper clearance.

t_ch: 这也不行那也不行，你到底想怎样？让咱哥俩在前台打地铺是吧？
t_en: So nothing works, huh? What's your solution then? Are you saying we sleep here, at the reception?

t_ch: 请您稍安勿躁。我们需要联系上二位的同伴才能确认你们的身份……
t_en: Please be patient. We need to contact your companions in order to confirm your identities...

t_ch: 但现在似乎是要先确认我们的身份，才能联系我们的同伴。
t_en: And now it seems you need to confirm our identities before you can contact our companions.

t_ch: 确实是这样。
t_en: It seems so.

t_ch: 他宝贝的，少给我整这些官僚主义死循环啊！小姑娘，我不是针对你，这事你能办就帮我们办，办不了就找个能办的人过来，好吗？
t_en: Fudge! Look, nothin' personal, but if you can't handle this, go find someone else who can, okay?

t_ch: 二位客人请息怒！我记得当时，是橡木家系的家主星期日先生亲自处理此事的。请稍等片刻，我这就去联系他。
t_en: Please calm down, dear guests! I do recall that Mr. Sunday, the Oak Family Head, personally handled this issue earlier. Please wait a moment while I contact him.

t_ch: 她应该不是有意刁难我们，而是真的不知道该怎么办。
t_en: I don't think she's trying to give us a hard time. She really just doesn't know what to do.

t_ch: 现状不妙啊。刚在列车上你也试过了，他们确实没回你的消息。
t_en: I have a bad feeling about this. You tried to contact them on the Express earlier, but they didn't respond.

t_ch: 有些令人在意的事，我先离开一会儿。你在这等候那位女士吧。
t_en: Something doesn't seem right. I need to leave for a moment. You can stay here with the receptionist.

t_ch: 去吧，速去速回啊。
t_en: Sure thing — just don't keep me waiting forever.

t_ch: 谐乐大典就要开始了，好期待呀～
t_en: The Charmony Festival is about to start! I'm so excited!

t_ch: 哥们姐们，你们都是来参加谐乐大典的？
t_en: Hey, are you guys here for the Charmony Festival too?

t_ch: 我倒不是专程来的！只是正好赶上。其实我都不太清楚那是做什么的，就听说特别热闹。
t_en: Well, I didn't come all the way here specially for the festival. Honestly, I don't really even know what it's about, but I heard it's a lot of fun.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，就那程度，在我们亚楠利亚早就见怪不怪了！父皇当年给我办的生日会，阵仗绝对不比这谐乐大典小。
t_en: Well, back in my homeworld, Anaria, we have festivals like that all the time. My dad threw me a birthday party one time that was just as extravagant as the Charmony Festival.

t_ch: 听你吹牛吧！人家谐乐大典可是一琥珀纪举办一次的盛会，成本是你过个生日能比的？
t_en: Oh, come on! The Charmony Festival is a once-in-an-Amber-Era event. How can a birthday party compare?

t_ch: 这话就不对了，你怎么知道她不是一琥珀纪才过一次生日呢？
t_en: Well, you never know, right? Maybe on her world birthdays only happen once an Amber Era?

t_ch: 别聊这个了，听说了么？梦里好像发生了事…你们有消息么？
t_en: Anyway, let's forget about that. Have you heard about the... uh, unsettling things happening in the Dreamscape?

t_ch: 事？什么事，不会把谐乐大典给搅黄了吧？别啊，我期待好久了！
t_en: Unsettling things? What could possibly go wrong? It better not ruin the Charmony Festival. I've been looking forward to it!

t_ch: 瞧你这急样，不懂了吧，这种大型活动开幕在即，谣言肯定少不了。别担心，真有什么事，家族肯定比我们急。
t_en: Relax, with a big event like this, there's bound to be lots of gossip and rumors. Don't worry. If anything does happen, The Family will be on top of it.

t_ch: 哦！那就好！我专程跑来共襄盛举的，就怕这庆典出事呢！
t_en: Oh! That's a relief! I didn't come all this way to see the festival go down the drain!

t_ch: （这俩宝贝什么都不知道。没必要继续套话了。）
t_en: (Well, looks like I won't get any fudgin' clues outta these two — they're clueless.)

t_ch: 这谐乐大典上肯定会有不少名流，我得好好结交一下。
t_en: Surely there'll be a lot of celebrities at the Charmony Festival. It's a great opportunity to make some valuable connections.

t_ch: 别带着那么功利的目的入梦啊！
t_en: Don't enter the dream with such a utilitarian agenda!

t_ch: 您好，我是酒店的安保负责人，猎犬家系的科蒂。有什么需要帮忙的吗？
t_en: Greetings, I'm Coty of the Bloodhound Family, Head of Security for the hotel. How may I assist you?

t_ch: 姐们，跟你扫听个事…我听说梦里出了点事，可能会影响谐乐大典……
t_en: Hello! So, there's something I wanted to ask about... I've been hearing some unsettling rumors about certain incidents that might affect the Charmony Festival...

t_ch: 出了什么事啊？我可是专门从哈衣艾怡联邦赶来的，别让我白跑一趟啊！
t_en: Do you think there's anything to be worried about? I've traveled all the way from the Hyai'i Federation, and I don't want my trip to be ruined!

t_ch: 呃…啊？
t_en: Umm... what do you mean?

t_ch: 你什么都没听说吗？
t_en: Wait, you haven't heard?

t_ch: 虽然不知道您的消息从何而来，但请不要相信这些风言风语。我以猎犬家系成员的名义向您保证，谐乐大典一切进展顺利。
t_en: I'm not sure where you heard those rumors, but they're completely baseless. I can assure you, as a representative of the Bloodhound Family, that everything is going smoothly for the Charmony Festival.

t_ch: 各家系当前的最优事项，就是确保谐乐大典按时开幕。这次连「梦主」都亲自赶赴一线，您就放一百个心吧，绝不会让您白跑一趟。
t_en: At present, all the Families are focused on making sure the festival starts on time. Even the Dreammaster himself has arrived. So don't worry. Your trip won't be in vain.

t_ch: 哈！有你这句话我就放心了。
t_en: Ah, that's a relief to hear.

t_ch: （不像是演的。也就是说，就连酒店员工也不知情。）
t_en: (She doesn't appear to be acting. So it seems that even the hotel staff are out of the loop.)

t_ch: 请您耐心等待盛会吧。家族绝不让您败兴而归。
t_en: Please be patient as you await the festival. The Family will spare no effort to ensure your satisfaction.

t_ch: 回来了？
t_en: Back already?

t_ch: 她还没回来吗？
t_en: Hasn't she returned yet?

t_ch: 是啊。我开始觉得放她去联系那星期日不是什么好主意了。
t_en: Nope. I'm starting to wonder if sending her to contact Sunday was a good idea.

t_ch: 无论员工还是客人都对梦里的情况一无所知，走到哪都是一片其乐融融的景象…要我说，这绝对不是什么好兆头。
t_en: Neither the staff nor the guests seem to know anything about what's happening in the Dreamscape, and wherever we go, all we see is people enjoying themselves... Definitely not a good sign.

t_ch: 我同意。还有件奇怪的事，在治理匹诺康尼的五大家系中，橡木家系是议会的组织者，也是梦境内外一切管理、协调工作的责任人。但奇怪的是……
t_en: I agree. Another unusual thing is that the Oak Family is supposed to be in charge of organizing the council and managing everything inside and outside the Dreamscape. However...

t_ch: 我在酒店转了一整圈，这么重要的家系，在这么重要的日子，我一个成员都没见到。
t_en: I walked around the hotel but didn't meet a single member of the Oak Family on such an important day.

t_ch: 他宝贝了个腿的…如果我没记错，那星期日不就是橡木家系的家主么？
t_en: Well I'll be forked... if I remember correctly, the head of the Oak Family is that Sunday guy, right?

t_ch: 此地不宜久留，先返回列车吧。
t_en: We shouldn't linger here too long. Let's go back to the Express for now.

t_ch: 别轻举妄动。兄弟，打劫过公司么？要是撒腿就跑，你会立马成为整条街上最亮眼的崽。
t_en: Not so fast. Have you ever robbed the IPC, bro? If you run away now, everyone will be chasing after you.

t_ch: 你是要我们老老实实待着？
t_en: Are you suggesting we sit here and do nothing?

t_ch: 未必要老老实实，但先待着吧。家族就算有阴谋，也不可能料到咱俩会登门拜访。对他们而言，我们才是「不确定因素」。
t_en: I wouldn't say "do nothing," but let's stay put for now. Even if The Family has ulterior motives, they couldn't have anticipated us showing up here. We're the surprise factor for them.

t_ch: 他们不会贸然出手的。可不止我们在担心打草惊蛇，家族一定也害怕惊动了外人…看见了么，这酒店里还有公司狗在盯着呢。
t_en: They don't want to attract unwanted attention from certain outsiders, so they won't do anything reckless... See? The IPC lackeys are keeping a close eye on this hotel.

t_ch: …如果我是家族，就会假借流程，把不确定因素拖在这里。没必要故意走进他们的陷阱。
t_en: ...If I were a Family member, I'd find an official excuse and keep the surprise factors here. If we just wait here, that would be like walking into their trap.

t_ch: 当然没必要跟他们耗着。我给那忆者留了个「备用计划」，如果真的没办法进入梦境，她会在现实酒店的贵宾室给我留一瓶酒。
t_en: Of course, we don't need to walk into their trap. I gave a backup plan to the Memokeeper. If it turns out we won't be allowed to enter the Dreamscape, she'll order a drink for me in the VIP Lounge at the hotel in reality.

t_ch: 接头暗号？
t_en: A secret signal?

t_ch: 没错。
t_en: That's right.

t_ch: 一件物品确实能帮助忆者与你建立联系…但波提欧先生，希望你以后能提前告知我备用计划的存在。
t_en: A concrete object can indeed help the Memokeeper establish a connection with you... but Boothill, if you have more back-up plans in the future, I hope you'll let me know in advance.

t_ch: 见谅，你就当是我的习惯吧。我有那么几个损友，要是把计划透底了，他们铁定得给我整出点花活来，多少备用都不够。
t_en: I'm sorry, but it's one of my quirks. I have too many unreliable friends, and if I reveal that I have backup plans, things can... things can go awry. And that would leave all backup plans completely useless.

t_ch: 你是这儿的大堂经理，没错吧？
t_en: You're the lobby manager, right?

t_ch: 正是。请问有什么可以为您效劳的？
t_en: Yes, I am. How may I assist you?

t_ch: 我们是星穹列车的无名客，过来办入住的，一直都没回应！你们前台那小姑娘说要帮我们联系管事的，结果人也没影了！
t_en: We're the Nameless from the Astral Express! We wanted to check in, but there's something wrong with your system! The lady at the front desk said she would contact the manager, but now she's nowhere to be found!

t_ch: 咱兄弟俩在这儿干瞪眼大半天，一没水喝二没饭吃，宝了个贝的，家族就是这么招待人的？
t_en: We've been waitin' here forever, without any food or water! What the fork, man? Is this how The Family treats its guests?

t_ch: 你的「江湖智慧」就是找茬？
t_en: Is this your idea of "street smarts"? Starting an altercation?

t_ch: 这叫争取正当权益。
t_en: It's called "standing up for your rights."

t_ch: 两位稍安勿躁，来龙去脉我都知道，酒店需要先和星期日先生取得联系。这样吧，我安排两个贵宾室的酒水位，请二位边休息边等待。
t_en: I apologize for the inconvenience. Please wait while we try to contact Mr. Sunday. I'll arrange two premium seats in the VIP Lounge, so you can rest there while you wait.

t_ch: 看，这不就成了。
t_en: See? Just like that.

t_ch: …下次别再自称无名客了。
t_en: Just... just don't call yourself a Nameless next time.

t_ch: 两位英武的先生，晚上好。
t_en: Good evening, gentlemen.

t_ch: 嗯…哥们儿，我在这里预留了一瓶「阿斯德纳白橡木」，能帮我们找找吗？
t_en: Hey... I have an order for a bottle of Asdana's White Oak. Can you help us find it?

t_ch: 阿斯德纳白橡木？二位应该是记错了，我们这里没有这款酒。
t_en: Asdana's White Oak? I think there might be a misunderstanding. We don't serve that here.

t_ch: 不可能，你再好好想想？
t_en: No way. Are you sure you're not mistaken?

t_ch: 这么名贵的酒品如果有人预留，我一定会记得。毕竟这酒一支要卖几十万信用点…要是打碎或弄丢了，我可赔不起啊。
t_en: If someone had reserved such a beverage, I would definitely remember it. It sells for hundreds of thousands of credits per bottle, after all... I couldn't afford to cover for such an item if it were broken or lost.

t_ch: 怪了…难不成那忆者买不起？
t_en: That's strange... could it be that the Memokeeper couldn't afford it?

t_ch: 现在怎么办？
t_en: Then what should we do now?

t_ch: 不急，咱们先喝几杯。也许是我来得太快了，她还没赶上。
t_en: No need to rush. Let's grab some drinks first. Maybe I arrived too early and she hasn't come yet.

t_ch: 我看看你们这有什么单一麦芽果汁…给我来杯「欣嫩子谷<unbreak>40</unbreak>年」吧，纯饮，不加冰。
t_en: Let's see what kind of juice malts you all have here... Well, give me a glass of Hinnom Valley <unbreak>40</unbreak> Years. I'll have it neat, no ice.

t_ch: 这可是酒单上最贵的一款。您可真是内行啊。
t_en: Well, that's the most expensive one on the list. You have a taste for the finer things.

t_ch: 嘿，送的不喝白不喝……
t_en: Hah, it's on the house anyway...

t_ch: 您要来点什么吗？
t_en: What can I get for you?

t_ch: 随意，我都可以。
t_en: Anything you recommend is fine.

t_ch: 那就来杯今日特调「玻璃村庄」吧，经典苏乐达配上爆炸柠果汁，口感清爽，也符合您清冷的气质。请二位稍等。
t_en: Then I would recommend today's special, Glass Village — it's Classic SoulGlad mixed with Leboom juice. It's refreshing and suits your cool demeanor. Just one minute.

t_ch: 很快，安德森端上了两杯酒……
t_en: Soon, Anderson brings two cups of wine...

t_ch: 呼哈！这浓郁的黑火药烤肉蘸双氧水味，真是…绝了！真不愧是全银河最好的雪莉桶熟成麦芽果汁。
t_en: Ahh! This flavor... Dynamite Barbecue with Rocket Fuel... It really hits the spot! Truly the finest sherry cask-aged malt juice in the cosmos.

t_ch: 「黑火药烤肉蘸双氧水味」…真的是人类会喜欢的味道吗？
t_en: "Dynamite Barbecue with Rocket Fuel"... Is that really something that humans enjoy?

t_ch: 嘿嘿，他根本就不懂。
t_en: Hey, this guy doesn't know anything at all.

t_ch: 二位满意就好，请慢用。
t_en: As long as you are satisfied, dear guests. Please enjoy.

t_ch: 我们等那忆者半个系统时，如果她还不出现，就再想其他办法。这时间足够咱俩好好盘盘现状了，依你之见，问题出在哪？
t_en: Let's give the Memokeeper another half system hour. If she doesn't show up, we'll need to come up with a new plan. In the meantime, let's take stock of the situation. What do you think?

t_ch: 情况确实不甚明朗。盛会之星一定发生了什么，但公众却对此毫无认知。想必是有家族的位高权重者在掩盖事态吧。
t_en: The situation is unclear. Something must have happened on the Planet of Festivities, but the public is unaware of it. Someone in a position of power within The Family must be covering it up.

t_ch: 「同谐」向其他派系发出邀约本就不同寻常，况且还有公司和愚者参与其中，如果你口中的「虚无」令使也确有其事，匹诺康尼当下的形势…有些过于复杂了。
t_en: It's unusual for the followers of the Harmony to invite other factions, let alone the IPC and the Masked Fools... If what you said about the Emanator of the Nihility is true, the situation in Penacony is... a little complicated, to say the least.

t_ch: 其实关于「黄泉」，还有件令我在意的事。
t_en: Actually, there's something else I'm concerned about — regarding Acheron.

t_ch: 你也清楚，信仰「巡猎」的派系是银河里最惹不起的一帮人。任何一个神志清醒的家伙都不敢冒充仙舟联盟或巡海游侠，这完全是在找死……
t_en: As you know, the faction that follows the Path of The Hunt are some of the most dangerous folks in the Cosmos to mess with. I mean, who in their right mind would impersonate the Xianzhou Alliance or the Galaxy Rangers? It's like asking for a death wish...

t_ch: 仙舟人不是有句话吗，帝弓仅以光矢宣其轮椅——
t_en: Isn't there a saying among the Xianzhou people that "the Reignbow sect lets their Lux Arrow do all the beating..."

t_ch: 纶音，宣其纶音。
t_en: Talking. Do all the talking.

t_ch: 无所谓，你懂我意思就行。总之，别看巡海游侠销声匿迹那么多年，我们一直盯着这片宇宙呢。很多傻宝宁可冒犯泯灭帮，也不敢得罪游侠。
t_en: Well, you know what I mean. Even though the Galaxy Rangers have been out of sight for years, we've been keeping an eye on this region. Even the dumbest criminals know better than to mess with the Annihilation Gang, much less the Rangers.

t_ch: 但那个黄泉…至少从她做的事来看，不像是个疯子。正相反，她很有逻辑和条理，该留手时就留手，该杀伐果决时也绝不手软。
t_en: But that Acheron lady... she doesn't seem like a lunatic at all. On the contrary, she's highly logical and organized. She knows exactly when to hold back and when to strike without mercy.

t_ch: 你认为这样一个人借用巡海游侠的名号，别有目的。
t_en: And you believe that someone like her would have an ulterior motive for impersonating a Galaxy Ranger?

t_ch: 我没这么断定，只是觉得蹊跷，也可能她真的认识巡海游侠，也可能是她出于某种原因要引我们现身…不知道。
t_en: I'm not entirely sure, but I do have my suspicions. Maybe she knows a Galaxy Ranger, or perhaps she's trying to lure us out for some reason... which I can't figure out.

t_ch: 我还是更关注家族的异样。因为这场盛会，十数条命途的行者被召集至匹诺康尼。家族再怎么包容，也不会做出如此反常的举动。
t_en: Anyway, what worries me more are the anomalies within The Family. They've summoned followers from various paths for the festival. No matter how generous The Family might be, this move seems highly unusual.

t_ch: 除非邀请函不是由他们寄出，那家族在这种局面下依然坚持举办谐乐大典…就更耐人寻味了。
t_en: Unless the invitations weren't sent by them. If that's the case, it's even more intriguing that The Family insists on organizing the Charmony Festival... despite the chaos.

t_ch: 没准这一切就是「同谐」希佩的指示呢。你觉得这事不合理，那是因为人做不出来。
t_en: Maybe it's Xipe the Harmony pulling the strings. You find it beyond human understanding because it wasn't arranged by humans at all.

t_ch: 人会因为非理性的冲动做出傻事，会在触及自身利益的时候放弃原则，也会相信一些明知不该相信的东西，宝了个贝的，人甚至会打破自己刚定下的规矩！
t_en: People do stupid things out of irrational impulses. They abandon their principles when self-interest is involved. They believe in things they know they shouldn't, and fudge— they even break their own rules!

t_ch: 但星神不会。星神只会一条路走到黑，不撞南墙不回头——撞了也不回头！
t_en: But Aeons don't. THEY stick to their determined path and never turn back, even if THEY reach a dead end!

t_ch: 你认为这起事件背后，是希佩的意志在推动？
t_en: You think Xipe's will is behind all this?

t_ch: 也不一定就是祂，但肯定有个形而上的意识在作祟。别说哥们悲观，如果人类的自由意志可信，那还要巡海游侠做什么？
t_en: It may not necessarily be Xipe, but there's definitely some higher entity involved. I know it may sound pessimistic, but if human free will were reliable, why would we even need Galaxy Rangers?

t_ch: 把一切归结于星神和命途，事情就没那么复杂了。就像岚永远走在「巡猎」的道路上，就像阿基维利虽然不知所踪，但列车依然行驶在开拓的路上，永不脱轨。
t_en: It's much simpler when you boil it down to the Aeons and Paths, like how Lan always follows the Path of The Hunt or how the Express stays true to the Trailblaze despite Akivili's disappearance.

t_ch: 但我认为，阿基维利的陨落，同样是祂为无名客留下的宝贵遗产。
t_en: But in my opinion, Akivili's fall holds significance for the Nameless.

t_ch: 喔，我猜是因为失去了「绝对正确」的领导者后，无名客们必须为自己的选择负责了？
t_en: Oh? So you're saying the Nameless now have to take responsibility for their own choices because their "absolutely right" leader is gone?

t_ch: 是的。我认为旅途的意义，并不是为了走上一条「绝对正确」的道路……
t_en: Exactly. I believe the purpose of the journey isn't just about following a path that's always considered "absolutely right"...

t_ch: 而是为了在不可胜数的道路中，凭借自己有限的见识和判断，尽力选择「适合自己的道路」。
t_en: It's more about doing your best to choose the "right path" for yourself among countless possibilities, even with limited insight and judgment.

t_ch: 虽然不知道你经历了什么，但人要为自己负责，这点我赞同，任何人都没法代劳。
t_en: I don't know what you've been through, but I agree that people must take responsibility for their choices, because no one else can do it for them.

t_ch: 也正因如此，巡海游侠必须亲自找到那个冒牌货…弄清楚她究竟要做什么。
t_en: That's why the Galaxy Rangers need to uncover the impostor... and figure out her true intentions.

t_ch: 你们回来了？前面有两个人上车，说要找波提欧乘客。我让她们先在观景车厢等候了帕。
t_en: You're back? Two guests just boarded, saying they were looking for Boothill, so I told them to wait in the Parlor Car.

t_ch: 哦！来得正好。
t_en: Oh! Just in time!

t_ch: …两个人？
t_en: ...Two guests?

t_ch: 就是她。虽说星穹列车欢迎每一位乘客，但一个个都偷偷摸摸潜进来…你们是不是太不拿自己当外人了帕！
t_en: She's one of them. Look, we welcome all passengers on the Astral Express, but sneaking in like that... You have no regard for etiquette!

t_ch: 对不起，列车长，是我失了礼数，误以为列车对忆庭已经很熟悉了…眼下匹诺康尼局势错综复杂，也只剩下各位无名客值得信任。
t_en: My apologies, conductor. It was an oversight on my part. I assumed you were already acquainted with the Garden... Given the chaotic situation in Penacony, the Nameless are the only ones we can truly trust right now.

t_ch: 你就是那位忆者？
t_en: You are the Memokeeper?

t_ch: 初次见面，丹恒先生，我在其他人的记忆中见过你。而波提欧先生…我们也算初次见面，希望你喜欢那瓶阿斯德纳白橡木。你真会点些不好找的酒。
t_en: Pleased to meet you, Dan Heng. I've seen you in others' memories. And as for Boothill... This is our first face-to-face meeting. I hope you enjoyed that bottle of Asdana's White Oak. You sure have a refined taste.

t_ch: 可真是让我一通好找啊，忆者！我就开门见山了，把你知道的都告诉我。
t_en: Finally, Memokeeper! Well, let's cut to the chase. Spill everything you know.

t_ch: 正有此意。但在此之前请容我先做个介绍，我叫黑天鹅，是流光忆庭的忆者。而关于那位黄泉女士的故事……
t_en: That's precisely what I intend to do. But before that, please allow me to introduce myself. My name is Black Swan, and I serve the Garden of Recollection as a Memokeeper. As for Acheron's story...

t_ch: 也许她本人比我更清楚。
t_en: I'm sure she knows it better than I do.

t_ch: 二位好，我就是黄泉。
t_en: Greetings. I'm Acheron.

t_ch: 什么？！他宝了个贝的——流光忆庭的，你出卖我？！
t_en: What!? You Garden of Recollection shirtbag, you betrayed me!?

t_ch: 抱歉，这是我的请求。出于一些原因，我遭到匹诺康尼放逐，所幸这位忆者一路随行，我才有机会悄无声息地摆脱家族的控制。
t_en: I apologize, but she did that at my request. Due to certain... reasons, I have been exiled by The Family. Thankfully, this Memokeeper came to my aid and helped me escape their surveillance unnoticed.

t_ch: 实际上并非随行，而是跟踪。过程也绝对谈不上「悄无声息」…但算了，就依你吧。
t_en: To be honest, it was more like stalking than helping, and the process was far from "unnoticed"... But we did escape.

t_ch: 我请求她带我去一个家族视线之外的地方，联系几个值得信任的人，也就是各位了。
t_en: I asked her to guide me to a place beyond The Family's reach and to contact a few trustworthy individuals, namely all of you.

t_ch: 信任？哈哈，哈哈哈哈哈…小可爱，你是拿我当疯子还是傻子？
t_en: Trustworthy? Ha... hahahahaha! Son of a nice lady! You think I'm dumb or something?

t_ch: 要不这样，先让我在你身上开几个窟窿，看看里面藏着的究竟是什么，然后咱们再来谈信任……
t_en: How about this? I'll put a few bullet holes in your head and see what secrets spill out, then we can talk about "trust"...

t_ch: 不用如此吧。你想知道的我会悉数告知，但不是现在…如果我的身份没有败露，或许还有更多时间，但眼下我们只能这么做了。
t_en: It doesn't have to be like that. I'm willing to answer all your questions, but not right now... If my cover hadn't been blown, we might have had more time, but at the moment, we don't have any other options.

t_ch: 只能？什么只能？
t_en: No other options? What do you mean?

t_ch: 唯有如此，我才能保障各位的安全……
t_en: This is the only way I can ensure everyone's safety...

t_ch: 请星穹列车立即跃迁，离开阿斯德纳星系。
t_en: I kindly request an immediate warp jump out of the Asdana star system.

t_ch: 这位乘客的意思是……
t_en: This passenger is requesting...

t_ch: 依我之见，她并无恶意，并且说的是实话。
t_en: As far as I can tell, she's not a threat and seems to be telling the truth.

t_ch: 丹恒先生，我曾与你的同伴短暂同行，也知晓他们身在何方。请相信各位无名客仍平安无事，但也同样需要我们的帮助。
t_en: I've briefly traveled with your companions and know their whereabouts, Dan Heng. Please rest assured, your Nameless companions are safe, but they need our help.

t_ch: 而波提欧先生，你或许已经猜到了…我在等待你的到来。巡海游侠行踪不定，彼此之间也往来甚少，原谅我只能通过这种方式与你们取得「联系」。
t_en: As for Boothill, as you may have guessed... I've been waiting for you. Galaxy Rangers are known for their elusive nature and limited contact with each other, so this is the only way I could "reach out" to you.

t_ch: 只有这样，我才能找到真正的巡海游侠。也唯有如此，我才能兑现一个久远的承诺……
t_en: Only by doing this can I find a true Galaxy Ranger and fulfill a long-standing promise...

t_ch: …将「他」的遗物物归原主。
t_en: ...To return "his" relics to their rightful owner.

t_ch: 曾有人这么对我说…每一场雨都是苍天对世界的怜悯。
t_en: Someone once told me... that every rainfall is like a gift from the heavens, a sign of their mercy upon the world.

t_ch: 雨露是神的眼泪，因人世的悲伤而淌下。但正因它们还会落下，代表众神尚未对这个世界失去希望。
t_en: Raindrops are said to be the tears of the Gods, shed in response to the sorrows of the world. Their constant pouring is a reminder that the Gods haven't abandoned us yet.

t_ch: 所以……
t_en: So...

t_ch: 以防万一，如果那忆者始终不出现，我还有个备用计划…这是最后一个了。
t_en: Just in case, I have a backup plan if the Memokeeper doesn't show up... this is my final backup plan, I promise.

t_ch: 你的备用计划真不少。
t_en: You sure have a lot of cards up your sleeve.

t_ch: 我呢，其实不太擅长弯弯绕绕，如果能干回老本行，很多事都会变得简单许多。
t_en: Well, going back to my old career would make things a lot easier.

t_ch: 丹恒兄弟，你之前在酒店转了一圈，有没有看见哪位客人，或哪几位客人…身份比较尊贵？
t_en: By the way, when you were walking around the hotel, did you happen to see any... important-looking guests?

t_ch: …你想做什么？
t_en: ...What's your plan?

t_ch: 很简单，咱们要悄无声息地绑上几个人质，后面就什么都好办了，既可以拿来和家族交涉，也可以拿走他们的身份——
t_en: It's simple. We just grab some hostages and use them as bargaining chips with The Family. Or maybe we can even take their identities...

t_ch: 不必了，现在就返回列车。
t_en: No need for that. We'll return to the Express now.

t_ch: 怎么！难不成你怕了，兄弟？掏出你的枪来，咱们该干票大的了！
t_en: Wait! Are you getting scared? Draw your weapon! Let's make a big scene!

t_ch: 二位是要走了吗？那刚才点的<color=#dbc291ff>阿斯德纳白橡木</color>要退掉吗？
t_en: Are you leaving, esteemed guests? Would you like to cancel that <color=#dbc291ff>Asdana's White Oak</color> you just ordered?

t_ch: …啊？阿斯德纳白橡木？可你刚才不是说……
t_en: ...Huh? Asdana's White Oak? But didn't you just say...

t_ch: 哈哈，看来二位是有些醉了。就在半分钟前，您刚跟我点了一瓶阿斯德纳白橡木。
t_en: Looks like you are a bit intoxicated, esteemed guests. You ordered a bottle of Asdana's White Oak just a moment ago.

t_ch: 看来…你的忆者朋友来找你了。
t_en: Looks like... your Memokeeper friend has finally arrived.

t_ch: …哦对对对，瞧我这脑子，义体改造多了就是会这样，健忘！让我看看…他宝贝的，真是阿斯德纳白橡木，上面有行字……
t_en: ...Oh, right! Sorry, my memory's not the best. You know, too many modifications and all. Anyway, let me check... Well fork me... It's Asdana's White Oak alright, and there's a note...

t_ch: …「我在星穹列车上等你。」
t_en: ..."I'll be waiting for you on the Astral Express."

t_ch: 是她给你的留言，错不了。她知道我们在一起行动，也知道酒店并不安全，要找个掩人耳目的地方。
t_en: No mistake, that's her message to you. She knew the hotel wasn't safe, so she suggested we find another place.

t_ch: 结果绕了一大圈，还是回到了星穹列车。那还等什么，赶紧走吧！
t_en: Well, looks like we took a detour, but now it's back to the Astral Express. So, what are we waiting for? Let's go!

t_ch: 这场雨，持续多久了？
t_en: How long has this rain been going on for?

t_ch: 曾经，我也和你一样期待它会在某一天停息，就这么过去了几年、几十年…最后，「希望」比这场雨更早迎来终点。
t_en: I used to believe, just like you, that it would eventually stop. Years and decades passed... and in the end, such hope faded away before the rain did.

t_ch: 看来你口中的神并不存在。
t_en: Looks like the God you mentioned doesn't exist after all.

t_ch: 这么说的时候，老者的目光始终看向远方。那细密的黑雨中，数之不尽的，像是烟雾缭绕般变化、朦胧的手的翳影，一只、一只从海面中伸出，伸向天空。
t_en: As he spoke, the old man's gaze remained fixed on the distance. Amidst the fine drizzle of black rain, countless shadowy hands emerged from the sea, shrouded in an ethereal mist, reaching out towards the sky one by one.

t_ch: 换我为你讲个故事吧……
t_en: Well, let me share a story with you...

t_ch: 凡人走在命途上，就像坐着小船渡过水面，留下一条蜿蜒的行迹，推开无数可能性的涟漪。相较人类转瞬即逝的一生，这些波浪久久不会平息。
t_en: Mortals who walk the Paths are like sailors on a vast ocean, leaving behind a trail that creates countless ripples of possibilities. These ripples last longer than the fleeting lifetimes of humans.

t_ch: 而其中有些人，他们存在的痕迹过于强烈，以致在这一簇簇浪花里留下了自己的倒影。
t_en: And for some, their presence leaves such a strong mark that it's reflected in the waves.

t_ch: 就像是…海面上的那些影子。
t_en: Like... those shadows on the ocean.

t_ch: 「血罪灵」…命途行者的执念，它们从IX的阴影中诞生，将自己视作事主，不自知地重复着逝者生前的行为。
t_en: Sin Thirsters... the obsessions of the Pathstriders. They emerge from the depths of IX, seeing themselves as masters of their own destiny, unknowingly repeating the actions of their past lives.

t_ch: 它们从「虚无」中诞生，向着「虚无」而去，度过毫无意义的一生。但就是这么一群空虚的幻影……
t_en: They emerge from the Nihility and head toward it, leading purposeless lives. However, these hollow phantoms...

t_ch: …却曾经是我重要的同伴，一群巡海游侠。
t_en: ...They were once my dear companions, a group of Galaxy Rangers.

t_ch: 你是在守望它们吗？
t_en: Are you watching over them?

t_ch: 守望？不，我是在超度它们。
t_en: Watching over them? No, I'm guiding them toward transcendence.

t_ch: 那是一场惨烈的战争，一场轰动寰宇的讨伐，宇宙见证了绝灭大君「诛罗」的陨落，但代价…除了亲历者，没人会记得代价。
t_en: It was a brutal war, a crusade that shook the universe. The universe witnessed the fall of Zulo the Lord Ravager, but it came at a price... A price so hefty that only those who were there still remember.

t_ch: 「巡猎」的死志直至生命终结也不会平息，所以总得人来引渡这些亡魂，他们生前都是英雄，死后不该沦为「虚无」的傀儡。
t_en: The unwavering determination of The Hunt followers persists even in death, so someone must guide these lost souls to their life beyond. They were heroes in their time, and they shouldn't be reduced to mere puppets of the Nihility.

t_ch: 至于我…我同样在那片战场上失去了太多，无法再度踏上征程了，反而变成了最适合完成这件事的人。
t_en: As for me... I've suffered too many losses on that battlefield to advance any further, and that makes me the most fitting person to carry out this task.

t_ch: 但你知道，这些血罪灵…毕竟不是他们。
t_en: But you know, these Sin Thirsters... They are not who they used to be.

t_ch: 在你看来，这件事没有意义吗？
t_en: Does this seem pointless to you?

t_ch: 但有些事即便没有意义，也总是要去做的。
t_en: Well, some tasks have to be done, even if they are pointless.

t_ch: 我可以帮你。
t_en: I can help you.

t_ch: 为了什么？
t_en: For what?

t_ch: 「虚无」的意义…那同样是我的所求。
t_en: For the meaning of the Nihility... that's what I've been seeking.

t_ch: …也对，常人怎么可能踏足此地呢？
t_en: ...I see. After all, this realm is off-limits to ordinary souls, right?

t_ch: 谢谢你，陌生人。祝你能在这趟旅途中找到答案。
t_en: Thank you, stranger. I wish that you find what you seek.

t_ch: 在那之前，我还有一个问题……
t_en: Before we part ways, I have one more question...

t_ch: 诚然，血罪灵的行为，乃至它们的一生，在我们的视角下都毫无意义。可如果，我是说如果……
t_en: It is true that their actions and even their entire lives may seem pointless from our perspective, but if, and it's just an "if"...

t_ch: 如果这正是逝者们期望的结果，我们还应令它做出改变吗？
t_en: If this is what the departed ones expected, should we try to change it?

t_ch: 这是一个好问题，也很难回答，至少…我不知道答案。
t_en: A good question, and a profound one... I don't know the answer.

t_ch: 但我知道的是，总有一天，我也会与世长辞。我发自内心地希望，在那个时候……
t_en: What I do know is that one day, I too will pass away. I hope that when that day comes...

t_ch: 会有人在我的坟前，也献上一束花。
t_en: Someone will stand at my grave and place a bouquet of flowers.

t_ch: 女士们先生们，欢迎来到热砂分会场！这里是挑战者的盛宴，逐梦客的华典，全宇宙目光聚集的中心！
t_en: Ladies and gentlemen, welcome to Scorchsand Hall! This is where challengers thrive and Dreamchasers shine, all under the watchful eye of the entire universe!

t_ch: 只要你有雄心，有梦想，肯奋斗——亲爱的朋友，下一位匹诺康尼的盛典巨星，就是你！
t_en: If you have ambition, dreams, and the drive — dear friends, the next superstar of Penacony's Charmony Festival could be you!

t_ch: 哇！搞得有模有样的！我都有点激动起来了！
t_en: Wow! They've really outdone themselves! I'm starting to get excited!

t_ch: 看哪，现在走来的是四位斗志昂扬的朋友！你们想成为盛典巨星吗？
t_en: Behold, here come four friends with spirits high and full of zeal! Are you aspiring to be the superstars of the festival?

t_ch: 咦…是在说我们吗？
t_en: Uh... Is he talking about us?

t_ch: 对！不要怀疑，从你们身上，我看到了巨星的潜质！
t_en: Yes, you! There's no doubt about it. I see you have all the potential of a superstar in you!

t_ch: 四位选手，你们来这里是想获得什么？
t_en: Excuse me, you four, what are you hoping to get out of all this?

t_ch: 作为最后一批参赛者，你们有多大把握能够通过所有挑战？
t_en: As the last group of contestants, how confident are you in overcoming all of the challenges?

t_ch: 能接受我们的个人专访吗？就一会！
t_en: Would you be open to a brief exclusive interview with us? It'll be quick!

t_ch: 前途迢递孱颜险，旌旆蔽天争冠冕！
t_en: Your journey is long and fraught with peril, yet under a sky blanketed by banners, you vie for the crown!

t_ch: 剑与玫瑰！守护纯美！纯美纯美！魁梧奇伟！
t_en: The Sword and Rose! Protect the Beauty! The Beauty, the Beauty! Magnificent and majestic!

t_ch: 骑士脑袋硬！岚哥一根筋！比赛不必赢！乐子不能停！
t_en: A knight's head is hard as steel! Brother Lan's focus is stubborn as a heel! We don't all have to be winners, but if we don't have fun, we'd all be sinners!

t_ch: 人怎么越来越多了！感觉什么牛鬼蛇神都冒出来了，我们还是赶紧进去比赛吧！
t_en: People are pouring in! Kinda feels like all sorts of baddies are showing up. Let's get in there quickly and enter the competition!

t_ch: 女士们，先生们，请让一让，让一让！
t_en: Ladies and gentlemen, please make way. Make way!

t_ch: 现在向我们走来的，是匹诺康尼十大富豪之一，苏乐达™商业帝国的缔造者——艾迪恩先生！
t_en: Coming towards us now, is one of Penacony's top ten wealthiest tycoons, and the SoulGlad™ business empire's founder — Mr. Aideen!

t_ch: 自我介绍一下，我是苏乐达™工厂的厂长，艾迪恩•列达。四位朋友，也向全银河的观众介绍一下自己吧！
t_en: Allow me to introduce myself. I'm the director of SoulGlad™'s factory, Aideen Leeda. My four friends, introduce yourselves to the audience across the cosmos!

t_ch: 嗯，大家好，我是来自星穹列车的无名客，姬子。这几位是我的同行者。
t_en: Mm, hello everybody, I'm Himeko, a Nameless from the Astral Express, and these are my companions.

t_ch: 嗯…你们不用隐藏身份吗？
t_en: Ahem... Don't you guys need to hide your identities?

t_ch: 瞒不住啦，全匹诺康尼都贴满了咱们的海报…但正因为人人都认识星穹列车，家族才不敢轻举妄动。
t_en: Can't hide it anyways, Penacony is plastered with our posters... and because the Astral Express is so well-known, The Family won't dare to make any rash moves.

t_ch: 大家好，我是{NICKNAME}，她是三月七。
t_en: Hello everyone, I'm {NICKNAME}, and she's March 7th.

t_ch: 我是银河球棒侠，她是赵相机。
t_en: Hello everyone, I'm the Galactic Baseballer, and she's Say~Cheese~.

t_ch: 哎呀！不要大庭广众之下喊我网名好吗！
t_en: Ah! Don't expose my net handle to everyone!

t_ch: 大家好，我是大家好。
t_en: Hello everyone, I'm "Hello Everyone."

t_ch: 你认真点，这是在直播呢！
t_en: Hey, be a bit more serious. We're live on air!

t_ch: 危急关头还来选秀真的好吗…
t_en: Is it really a good idea to have a talent show in this pivotal moment of our story?

t_ch: 这、这也是没办法的办法啦…我们尽量速战速决！
t_en: G—Given the situation, this is our best hope... Let's just get it over with quickly!

t_ch: 大家好，我是三月七！一个喜欢到处冒险的普通女孩！
t_en: Hello everyone, I'm March 7th! I'm an ordinary girl who loves adventures!

t_ch: 大家好，我是流萤，嗯…也是一个喜欢到处冒险的普通女孩。
t_en: Hello everyone, I'm Firefly. Mm... I am also an ordinary girl who enjoys adventures.

t_ch: 原来是无名客一行！那最后的对决定会精彩无比！时间珍贵，四位朋友，和我来吧！
t_en: So it's a bunch of Nameless guests! This final face-off is bound to be spectacular! Time is precious. My four friends, come with me!

t_ch: 喝下这瓶苏乐达™，快乐美梦速速达！
t_en: Grab a bottle of SoulGlad™, and make your dreams a blast!

t_ch: 喝下这瓶苏乐达™，快乐美梦速速达！
t_en: Grab a bottle of SoulGlad™, and make your dreams a blast!

t_ch: 无名客们，你们的到来让我想起匹诺康尼初建时的盛况。那时我还是个毛头小子，看见「钟表匠」的广告就凭着一腔热血离开家乡，来到这里挖掘人生的第一桶金。
t_en: Nameless, your arrival reminds me of the grand occasion when Penacony was first established. I was still a young bright-eyed lad back then, lured here by the Watchmaker's ads, full of zeal and ready to make my first fortune in life.

t_ch: 某一天，我因繁重的劳作不慎晕倒，被苏萨先生的饮料救活一命。那甜美的味道从此便烙印在我的脑海里，驱使着我创造了如今的苏乐达™！
t_en: Once, during a particularly grueling day, I passed out and was resuscitated by a drink from Mr. Sousa. That sweet taste has since been etched in my mind, and that was what drove me to create the SoulGlad™ that we all know and love today!

t_ch: 逐梦年代就是这么神奇。我怀念那个时代，也怀念「钟表匠」，这片热砂会场便是我为纪念那个充满可能性的时代而建立的。
t_en: The Dreamchasing Era was truly a wondrous time. Ah, I miss those days... and the Watchmaker. Scorchsand Hall is my homage to that time of boundless possibilities.

t_ch: 衷心祝愿你们成功走到最后，成为新生代的匹诺康尼巨星！那么在正式开赛前，还有什么想说的吗？
t_en: I wholeheartedly hope you make it to the finish and emerge as the next superstars of Penacony! Now then, is there anything you'd like to say before the competition officially begins?

t_ch: 我们一定会胜利的！
t_en: Nah, we'd win.

t_ch: 哈哈，真不愧是勇往直前的开拓者！三月七小姐，你呢？
t_en: Haha, that's the Trailblazing spirit! How about you, Miss March?

t_ch: 可以快点开始吗？
t_en: Can we get the ball rolling already?

t_ch: 哈哈，真不愧是雷厉风行的开拓者！三月七小姐，你呢？
t_en: Haha, there's that swift and decisive Trailblazing spirit! How about you, Miss March?

t_ch: 我军必败无疑！
t_en: Rest assured, we'll lose!

t_ch: 哈哈，真不愧是…居安思危的开拓者！
t_en: Haha, there's that... uh, the ever-vigilant Trailblazing spirit we all know!

t_ch: 喂！你也该改改那失败主义的毛病了吧……
t_en: Hey! You should really fix that defeatist mentality of yours...

t_ch: 三月七小姐，你呢？
t_en: Miss March, how about you?

t_ch: 观众们好呀！接下来请欣赏刷新通关速度记录的超级三月七大冒险！
t_en: Hello everyone! Next up, get ready for the mega March 7th adventure, where I'm going to break the speed run world record!

t_ch: 开拓未知，挑战极限！真不愧是三月七小姐！流萤小姐呢？
t_en: Trailblazing into the uncharted and challenging the limits! That's Miss March 7th for you! How about Miss Firefly?

t_ch: 希望在旅途的终点…每个人都能抵达向往的结局。
t_en: I hope that by the end of this journey... Everyone will have achieved the outcome that they hoped for.

t_ch: 多么美好的祝福！姬子小姐，你对你们的队伍有什么期望？
t_en: A wonderful wish! Miss Himeko, what are you expecting from your team?

t_ch: 大家安全第一。
t_en: Safety first, everyone.

t_ch: 哈哈，多么朴实又温暖的话语！
t_en: Haha, simple words, but full of warmth!

t_ch: 等待着你们的是三道关卡，每一道都与那个时代有关。前两道关卡各有两条路线供各位选择，每条路上都有独一无二的挑战！
t_en: Waiting for you are three stages, each connected to that era. The first two stages offer two distinct paths to choose from, with unique challenges on each route!

t_ch: 而最后一关…你们将挑战一位坚守至今的守擂者，一位拥有高贵品德的人气选手！
t_en: And in the last stage... you will face off against a champion who has defended the title to this very day — a beloved contender whose noble virtues are unrivaled!

t_ch: 规则就是这么简单，诸位勇士明白了吗？那么我宣布，由苏乐达™有限公司赞助的第二十届第三十三场热砂盛典——正式开始！
t_en: Those are the rules. Simple. Everyone clear? Now then, I hereby announce that the thirty-third Scorchsand Festival of the twentieth season, sponsored by SoulGlad™ Enterprises... has started!

t_ch: 各位，离「谐乐大典」的时间越来越近了，我们必须尽快抵达终点…考虑到效率和安全，两两组队行动是最好的选择。
t_en: Everyone, as the Charmony Festival is drawing closer, we must reach the end as quickly as possible... Factoring in efficiency and safety, splitting up into two groups is the best choice.

t_ch: 我和三月与流萤小姐相识的时间不久，还不熟悉彼此…{NICKNAME}与她搭档或许更稳妥些。
t_en: March and I haven't known Miss Firefly for too long, and aren't overly familiar with her... It'd probably be better if the two of you paired up.
